nasb.text: “My servant David will be king over them, and they will all have one shepherd; and they will walk in My ordinances and keep My statutes and observe them.

esv.text: “My servant David shall be king over them, and they shall all have one shepherd. They shall walk in my rules and be careful to obey my statutes.

cnv.text: “‘我的僕人大衛必作他們的王；他們眾人只有一個牧者。他們必遵行我的典章，謹守實行我的律例。

ccb.text: “‘我的仆人大卫要做王治理他们，成为他们唯一的牧人。他们必恪守我的典章，谨遵我的律例。
